reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 애견카페에서 판매하는거 보고 살깡살까 고민하다가 안샀는데ㅎ 바잇미에서 할인하는거보고 고민하지도않고 바로 구입을했습니다.저흰 두마리를 키우는데 비숑7개월아가가 노즈워크를 엄청좋아해요.도착하자마자 꺼내줬더니 환장합니다.사주길 잘했다는생각이 들면서 너무 뿌듯하네요.바느질이며 촉감도 좋고 한입에 물고다니기 좋고 던져줘서 물어올때도 좋아요.애벌레랑 함께 주문했는데 언니 말티즈한테 양보도 안하고 비숑이 다 차지하네요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I saw it being sold at a dog café and was debating whether to buy it, but didn't. Then I saw BITE ME had a sale and didn't even think twice—I just bought it right away. We have two dogs, and our 7-month-old Bichon absolutely loves nose work toys. As soon as it arrived, I took it out and she went crazy for it. I'm so proud I got it for her! The stitching is great, the texture feels nice, it's perfect for her to carry around in her mouth, and it's great when I throw it and she brings it back. I ordered it together with a caterpillar toy, but the Bichon won't even share with her older sister Maltese—she's claiming the whole thing! 😂

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 호야는 한 입에 물릴만한 사이즈와 삑삑이 그리고 뷰드러운 천재질의 장난감을 좋아해요! 항상 바잇미 공만 가지고 놀다가 이번에 새로 사줘봣는데 너무 좋아하고 자기전이나 아침에 일어나서 삑삑거리네요 ㅎㅎㅎ 색상도 이쁘고 소리도 잘나고 튼튼해서 좋습니다❤️
reviews.content_en: Hoya loves toys that are the right size to grab in one bite, have a squeaker, and are made of soft fabric! He used to only play with BITE ME balls, but I got him this new one and he absolutely loves it—he squeaks it before bed and right when he wakes up in the morning 😄 The colors are pretty, the sound is great, and it's durable, which is wonderful ❤️

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바잇미 풍선강아지 삑삑이 장난감 구매했어요 ㅎㅎ
바잇미 장난감 인형들은 전부 부드럽고
물고 뜯기 좋은 사이즈와 굴곡을 갖고 있는 것 같아요
저희 강아지가 잘 갖고 놀아요
파란색 삑삑이 인형 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought the BITE ME balloon dog squeaky toy 😄 All of BITE ME's plush toys are soft and seem to have the perfect size and texture for biting and chewing. Our dog plays with it really well. The blue squeaky toy is so adorable 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
✅️ 사이즈:3kg초반 소형견이 물기 좋은 사이즈
✅️ 촉감: 말랑하지않고 단단하고 튼튼함
✅️ 삑삑이+ 바스락이 다 가능해서 최애 장난감이 됨
✅️ 라벨을 워낙 좋아해서 자꾸 뜯으니 실밥이 나와서
      라벨은 처음에 제거해주는게 좋음
reviews.content_en:
✅️ Size: Perfect size for small dogs under 3kg to bite
✅️ Texture: Not soft, but firm and durable
✅️ Has both a squeaker and crinkle sounds, making it a favorite toy
✅️ Warning: My dog loves to chew on the label and pulls out threads, so it's best to remove the label first

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여운 박음질도 촘촘한 풍선인형이
왔어요! 배부분에 뾱뾱이가 있고 귀부분에는 바스락거리는
재질인데 울 강지는
하관이 짧은편이라 잘 물질못하는데 풍선허리춤이 얇아서 뾱뾱이가ㅜ잘눌리는지 울강쥐 신이났네여! 한참가지고
놀다가ㅜ버려진
저ㅜ처참한 풍선인형의ㅡ뒷모습 ㅠ 넘 귀엽네영! 던져줘서 물고올땐 더더욱 귀여워요ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Such a cute balloon toy arrived with tight, dense stitching! There's a squeaker in the belly and crinkly material in the ears. My pup has a short lower jaw so he usually can't grab things well, but the thin waist of the toy makes the squeaker easy to press, so my little guy is thrilled! After he's been playing with it for a while, it ends up looking pretty beat up in the back 😂 but it's so cute! And it's even cuter when I throw it and he brings it back 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
파란색이 강아지가 볼 수 있는 색이라고 해서 이번에 싹 노란색이랑 파란색 장난감으로만 구매 해보았어요 :)

느낌은 좀 딱딱? 단단하고 강아지들이 물고 놀기 딱 좋아요!
맘에 드는 장난감은 일단 침발라놓는 강아지들이라 이미 침 범벅이 됐네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅌㅋ 너무 귀여워요 정말 ❤️
reviews.content_en: I heard that blue is a color dogs can see, so this time I only bought toys in yellow and blue :) The feel is a bit firm and hard—perfect for dogs to bite and play with! Since my dogs are the type to slobber all over toys they like, it's already covered in drool 😂 It's honestly so adorable ❤️

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 평소에도 바잇미 장난감이면 환장하는 오댕이들입니다. 큰 맘 먹고 이것저것 구매했는데 역시 아이들이 너무 좋아하네요. 가격은 비싼 편이지만 아이들이 좋아해서 마음에 쏙 들어요.
reviews.content_en: My pups go crazy for BITE ME toys all the time. I made a big decision and bought a bunch of different ones, and sure enough, the kids absolutely love them. The price is a bit steep, but I'm so happy because my dogs love them.

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 평소 아이들이 유독 바잇미 장난감을 좋아해요. 다른 장난감보다 튼튼해서 꽤 오랫동안 가지고 놀 수 있어서 좋아요. 다른 봉제 장난감은 주면 5분 컷으로 망가지는데 바잇미는 안 그래요. 가격이 살짝 있는 편이지만 아이들 반응이 좋아서 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.content_en: My dogs especially love BITE ME toys compared to other brands. They're more durable, so the kids can play with them for quite a long time. Other plush toys get destroyed in 5 minutes, but BITE ME toys don't. The price is a bit high, but I'm very satisfied because my dogs' reactions are so good.

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 요즘 최애 장난감이예요, 사이즈가 작아서 입에 물기에도 좋나봐요! 귀, 다리 자근자근 씹어서 꼬매줘야 했지만 요즘 제일 잘 가지고 노는 장난감이예요! 그래서 다른 색도 있나 싶어서 찾아봤더니 요거 하나더라구요!  다른 색도 있으면 추가구매하고 싶어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's their favorite toy right now! The small size seems to be perfect for holding in their mouth. I've had to stitch up the ears and legs several times from chewing, but it's the toy they play with the most these days! I was curious if there were other colors, so I looked it up and found there's just one more. I'd love to buy additional colors if they come out 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 주둥이가 긴 아이가 더 좋아해요 짧은 친구는 그냥저냥인데 긴 친구는 너무 좋아해서 혼자 방에 가지고 들어가서 막막 가지고 노네요 곧 한 번 빨아줘야겠습니다… 이 친구가 운명하면 또 2대 장난감을 데리고 와야겠네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog with the longer snout loves it more—the shorter-snouted one is just so-so, but the one with the longer snout absolutely adores it and carries it into the bedroom to play with it all the time. I'll need to wash it soon... If this one doesn't make it, I guess I'll have to bring home a second one 😄

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워용 ㅎ 바잇미 장난감들이 젤 튼튼하고 이뻐서 신상은 무조건 구매합니다~
reviews.content_en: So cute! 😊 BITE ME toys are the toughest and prettiest, so I always buy their new products~

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
너무귀엽고 예뻐요 강아지들이 엄청좋아하고 등부분이 날씬해서 애들이물고 장난치기도 좋고 귀부분은 바삭거리기도하고 등부분은삑삑거려서 더흥미있어해요!!!
추천드립니다!!!!어린강아지 나이많은강아지 다좋음!!!
reviews.content_en: So adorable and pretty! My dogs absolutely love it and the slim back part is great for them to bite and play with. The ears make a crunchy sound and the back squeaks, so they find it even more interesting!!! I recommend it!!!! Works great for puppies and older dogs alike!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 두번째 구매입니다~애기가 너무 좋아하고 쉽게 터지지않아서 가지고 놀기 정말 좋아요! 배송도 빠르고 또 구매할 생각입니다
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase~ My pup loves it so much and it doesn't tear easily, so it's really great for playtime! Shipping was fast and I'm planning to buy again

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이가 물기 좋은 사이즈고요 작지만 요소요소 바스락소리도 나고 삑삑소리가 나서좋아요 튼튼합니다
reviews.content_en: It's a good size for my dog to bite. It's small but makes crinkly and squeaky sounds in different spots, which is great. It's durable

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
우리 깡아지가 얼마나 좋아하냐면요 
응가까지 같이 싸요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much that they even go potty while holding it 😂

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
클까봐 걱정했는데 저희 아가한테 사이즈 딱 좋아요
어가가 너무 좋아해요 귀엽게 생겼어요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was worried it might be too big, but it's the perfect size for my baby! My pup loves it so much 😊 It looks really cute too

reviews.name: 위****
reviews.content:
6.5키로 푸들 입에 딱 좋은 크기에요
역시나 좋아하네요!! ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for my 6.5kg Poodle's mouth. As expected, they love it!! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 3개월 아가가 가지고 놀기에 너무 좋아요 사이즈가 너무 크지 않아서 잘 가지고 놉니다ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Perfect for my 3-month-old puppy to play with! The size isn't too big so they can hold it really well ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 앙증맞고 씹을 구석이 많아서 갱얼쥐가 세상 좋아해요 ㅋ꙼̈ㅋ̆̎ㅋ̊̈ㅋ̌̈ㅋ̄̈ㅋ̐̈ㅋ̑̈ㅋ̆̈ 아직 모든 게 무섭고 아무것도 모르는 어린 멍뭉이지만 이게 내꺼라는건 확실히 알고 옴뇸뇸 잘 가지고 논다개 ˃̵͈̑ᴗ˂̵͈̑
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and has lots of spots to chew on, so my hamster absolutely loves it! ㅋ Even though my little pup is still scared of everything and doesn't know much yet, they definitely know this is theirs and happily carry it around everywhere 😊

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 이제 3개월 들어선 우리 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요 잘 때도 꼬옥 끼고 잔답니다 좋은 상품 감사해요🤍 애기가 좋아하니 저도 좋네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My puppy who's just turned 3 months old loves it so much! Even when sleeping, they hold it tight 🤍 Thank you for the great product! Since my baby loves it, I'm happy too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지 최애 삑삑이가 될 것 같아요
원래 하루면 망가지는데 이틀은 가네요 ㅎㅎ
삑삑이가 가운데에 물기 좋게 위치해서
재미있게 가지고 놉니다 👍
reviews.content_en: I think this will become our pup's new favorite squeaky toy! 🐶 Usually they destroy toys in a day, but this one lasted two days haha 😄 The squeaker is positioned perfectly in the middle so it's fun to chew on 👍

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 잘가지고 노네욯ㅎㅎ 다른인형보다 탄탄? 튼튼해요! 인형이 물컹하지 않고 탄탄하니 참고하세요! 강아지가 입으로 잡기 편해보여요!
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so well! It's sturdier than other plushies - nice and firm? So durable! The toy isn't mushy, it's really solid, just so you know! It looks really easy for my dog to grab with his mouth!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 바잇미 장난감에 환장하는데 ,, 이것도 너무 좋아해요 색도 쨍하고 예뻐서 저도 맘에 듭니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog is obsessed with BITE ME toys, and she absolutely loves this one too! The color is so vibrant and pretty, I love it too hehe 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 소형견한테 적당한 사이즈에요 새장난감만 있으면 눈돌아갑니다 ㅎㅎ 귀여운건 덤이에요
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for small breeds! Every time a new toy appears, my pup's eyes light up hehe 😄 And it's adorable as a bonus!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 늠늠 귀여워여ㅠㅠ 소형견 입에 딱 맞는 사이즈에요 잘 가지고 널아서 좋아오ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: So cute!! 🥺 The size is perfect for my small dog's mouth! He loves carrying it around, which makes me so happy 🥺

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
장난감 하루면 솜이 다 터져나오는데..
이건 진짜 튼튼합니다!! 다음에 또 구매하려구요!!
reviews.content_en: Most toys fall apart after a day with stuffing everywhere... but this one is seriously durable!! I'm definitely buying it again next time!!

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 세일하길래 구매했어요. 크지 않고 입으로 물기 좋은 사이즈입니다
reviews.content_en: Got it on sale! It's not too big and the size is perfect for grabbing with their mouth

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 작고 귀여운 인형이네요 색상도 화면이랑 똑같아요! 잘 쓸게용
reviews.content_en: It's a cute little plushie! The color looks exactly like in the picture! I'll use it well 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 갱얼쥐가 물고 다니기 좋운 사이즈에여 좋아하네여
reviews.content_en: It's a great size for my hamster to carry around and chew on, and he loves it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘귀여워용 하나씩 뜯어줄려구 쟁여뒀어용 ㅎㅎ 넘귀엽고 좋아용
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! 😄 I saved a bunch so I can give them one at a time hehe 😊 So cute and amazing!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 작고 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 애가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's small and cute haha My pup loves it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 잘 가지고 놀아서 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: It's adorable and my dog loves carrying it around to play with~

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 사이즈도 적당하고 튼튼해요
reviews.content_en: The size is just right and it's sturdy

reviews.name: 계****
reviews.content: 작지만 넘 귀여워요! 하루만에 파괴해버렸지만 꿰매서 다시 놀게 주려구요
reviews.content_en: It's small but so cute! My dog destroyed it in just one day, but I'm going to sew it up and let him play with it again

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
너무귀여워요생각햇던것보다작지만~~전맘에들어요
문제는저만맘에들어한다는점^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It's smaller than I thought, but I love it~~ The only problem is that only I love it, not my dog lol

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무좋아요 간식도잘먹구 인형도잘가지고노네요 또구매할게요!
reviews.content_en: I love it so much! My pup eats the treats well and loves carrying the toy around. I'll definitely buy it again!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 튼튼해서 좋아요! 크기는 생각보다 작아용
reviews.content_en: I love how sturdy it is! The size is a bit smaller than expected though

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 애기가 잘가지고놀아요 애챡인형입니다
reviews.content_en: My baby loves playing with it. It's a great toy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
인형 몸체가 적당히 얇으면서 길쭉해서 강아지가 물고 다니길 좋아해요!
바스락 소리도 잘 나고 물고 놀다보면 삑삑이 소리도 자주 나서 재밌어하네요👍
reviews.content_en: The toy body is nicely thin and elongated, so my dog loves picking it up and carrying it around! It makes crinkly sounds and squeaky noises too, so she finds it really fun to play with 👍

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
저번에 샀는데 금방 뜯어놔서 재구매 했어여!ㅎㅎ
요것두 주자마자 바로 뜯어놔서 망가졌지만 잠깐이라도
애기가 잘 갖고 놀아서 만족해여~😁
reviews.content_en: I bought it before and my pup tore it up pretty quickly, so I'm reordering! 😄 He ripped this one apart right away too, but even though it got destroyed, my baby had a great time playing with it, so I'm happy~ 😁

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 인별보고 귀여워서 바로 구매합니다. 다리늘 빠삭 몸통은 삑삑비 잘가지고 놀더니 하루지나면 시큰둥 숨겼다ㅇ다시 줍니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it right away because it looked so cute in the picture. The legs are nice and crispy, and the body has a good squeaky sound. But after a day, my pup loses interest and hides it. I have to find it and give it back to them.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 첨 쓸때는 아기라 삑삑이도 잘 못 물었는데 지금은 엄청 잘 물고 이걸로 터그도 하고 공처럼 굴리기도 하고 잘 놀아요!
reviews.content_en: At first, my puppy couldn't really bite the squeaker, but now they bite it really well! They play tug with it, roll it around like a ball, and just love playing with it!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 저희 만두 최애 장난감입니다ㅜㅜㅡ 입에물고 놓치를않음 ..하나빵구내서 2개미리사놓아요
reviews.content_en: This is our Mandu's favorite toy 😭 Once they get it in their mouth, they won't let go.. One got torn up, so I'm already buying 2 backups.

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아요 배송 빨라서 좋았어요^^ 자주 주문해요. 더 다양한 삑삑이 장난감이 나오면 좋겠어요~
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it well and I love how fast the shipping was^^ I order from you guys often. I'd love to see more variety in squeaker toys~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감 좋아해서 새로운거 또 사줬습니다ㅎ 역시 너무 좋아하네요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup loves BITE ME toys so I got them a new one 😄 They really love it as much as I expected 😄

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
풍선강아지 넘 기여워영~ㅎㅎ
인형 주자마자 벌써 안에 삑삑이랑 솜까지 다
뜯어놨어여..ㅋ
애기가 잘 갖고 놀아서  또 구매해야 겠어여 ^^
reviews.content_en: The balloon dog is so cute~😄😄 As soon as I gave the toy, my pup already tore out the squeaker and stuffing inside..ㅋ My baby plays with it so well that I'll have to buy another one soon ^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
하나는 선물용 하나는 울애기꺼로 주문했는데
사이즈도 딱이고 물곳이 많아서 좋아하는거같아요
reviews.content_en: I ordered one as a gift and one for my baby, and the size is perfect! It looks like they really like it because there are so many spots to bite.

reviews.name: 설****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 소리가 경쾌해 아기강아지의 시선 끌기 제격인 것 같습니다 만족해요
reviews.content_en: The squeaker sound is bright and cheerful - it seems perfect for catching a puppy's attention. I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지들이 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My dogs love it so much!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 사진보다 더 작은 느낌의 인형이예요  소형견에게 딱.  귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The toy feels smaller than in the photos. It's perfect for small breed dogs. It's so cute!
